headline: Why Investors Should Add Atmos Energy to Their Portfolio Right Now?
summary: ATO's customer growth, new rate approvals and $4.2B FY26 capex plan support earnings and dividend hikes despite the recent share dip.

headline: Best Dividend Aristocrats: May 2026
summary: The Dividend Aristocrats underperformed SPY YTD, returning 3.34% versus SPY's 10.39%, though 22 Aristocrats still posted double-digit gains.
